defaults.description: Default settings applied to all categories unless overridden.

toleranceGreen.description: Maximum deviation (ft) for green status. Default: 0.01 ft ≈ 1/8 inch.

toleranceYellow.description: Maximum deviation (ft) for yellow status. Default: 0.05 ft ≈ 5/8 inch.

comparisonMethod.description: How to calculate deviation: 'horizontal' (E/N only), 'vertical' (elevation only), or 'total' (3D distance).

coordinatePrecision.description: Decimal places for coordinate values in CSV export.

visualizationTransparency.description: Transparency percentage for deviation indicator DirectShapes.

createDeviationArrows.description: Whether to create 3D arrow DirectShapes showing deviation vectors.

arrowScaleFactor.description: Scale factor to exaggerate deviation arrows for visibility.

categories.description: Category-specific overrides. Each category can override any default setting.

toleranceGreen.description: Footings: Maximum deviation (ft) for green status.

toleranceYellow.description: Footings: Maximum deviation (ft) for yellow status.

toleranceGreen.description: Columns: Maximum deviation (ft) for green status. Tighter tolerance: 0.005 ft ≈ 1/16 inch.

toleranceYellow.description: Columns: Maximum deviation (ft) for yellow status.

comparisonMethod.description: Columns: Use total 3D deviation (Easting, Northing, and Elevation).

toleranceGreen.description: Walls: Maximum deviation (ft) for green status.

toleranceYellow.description: Walls: Maximum deviation (ft) for yellow status.

toleranceGreen.description: Slab on Grade: Maximum deviation (ft) for green status.

toleranceYellow.description: Slab on Grade: Maximum deviation (ft) for yellow status.

comparisonMethod.description: Slab on Grade: Use horizontal deviation.

defaultFamilyName.description: Default family name for control point selection filter.

defaultTypeName.description: Default family type name for control point selection filter.
